fields.name: Aurora Conference Room
fields.short_description: A polished meeting room for presentations, panels, and strategy sessions.
fields.description: Aurora Conference Room is designed for formal meetings and presentations. It offers a focused atmosphere, comfortable seating, and enough space for collaborative sessions with a medium-sized team.

fields.name: Canvas Studio
fields.short_description: A bright studio for rehearsals, media production, and creative workshops.
fields.description: Canvas Studio is ideal for smaller creative sessions. The room works well for photography setups, rehearsals, training videos, and idea sprints that need a more informal environment.

fields.name: Harbor Event Hall
fields.short_description: A large hall for showcases, public talks, ceremonies, and community events.
fields.description: Harbor Event Hall accommodates larger audiences and gives organizers room to configure seating, displays, and registration areas. It is suitable for high-traffic events that need visibility and flexibility.
